zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Shelton於1497年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可雪登時，她的父親John Shelton,25歲，母親Lady Anne Boleyn22歲。她和Captain Thomas Woodhouse至少有5個兒子和8個女兒。她去世於1583年9月11日在英國諾福爾可享年86歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Shelton于1497年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可雪登时，她的父亲John Shelton,25岁，母亲Lady Anne Boleyn22岁。她和Captain Thomas Woodhouse至少有5个儿子和8个女儿。她去世于1583年9月11日在英国諾福爾可享年86岁。

nameMeanings.name: Shelton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Nottinghamshire): habitational name primarily from Shelton (Nottinghamshire), but also from Shelton (Bedfordshire, Norfolk, Shropshire, and Staffordshire). The placenames all derive from Old English scelf ‘rock, ledge, shelf’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Shelton was born in 1497, in Shelton, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Shelton,, was 25 and her mother, Lady Anne Boleyn, was 22. She had at least 5 sons and 8 daughters with Captain Thomas Woodhouse. She died on 11 September 1583, in Norfolk, England, at the age of 86.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Shelton est née en 1497, à Shelton, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Shelton,, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Lady Anne Boleyn, avait 22 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 8 filles avec Captain Thomas Woodhouse. Elle est décédée le 11 septembre 1583, à Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 86 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Shelton 1497 in Shelton, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Shelton, 25 und ihre Mutter Lady Anne Boleyn 22. Sie hatte mit Captain Thomas Woodhouse mindestens 5 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie starb am 11. September 1583 im Alter von 86 Jahren in Norfolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Shelton è nata il nel 1497 nel Shelton, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Shelton,, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Lady Anne Boleyn, aveva 22 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 8 figlie con Captain Thomas Woodhouse. Morì il 11 settembre 1583, nel Norfolk, England, all'età di 86 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Sheltonが1497年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクシェルトンで生まれた時，父John Shelton,は25歳，母Lady Anne Boleynは22歳であった。彼女はCaptain Thomas Woodhouseとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と8人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1583年9月11日にイギリスノーフォルクで86歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Shelton(이)가 1497년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 셸턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Shelton,(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Anne Boleyn(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 Captain Thomas Woodhouse(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1583년 9월 11일 영국 노르폴크에서 86세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Shelton nasceu em 1497, em Shelton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Shelton,, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Lady Anne Boleyn, tinha 22 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 8 filhas com Captain Thomas Woodhouse. Ela faleceu em 11 de setembro de 1583, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 86 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Shelton родилась в 1497 г. в местности шелтон, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Shelton, было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Anne Boleyn, 22. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 8 дочерей от Captain Thomas Woodhouse. Она умерла 11 сентября 1583 г. в местности норфолк, Англия в возрасте 86 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Shelton nació en 1497, en Shelton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Shelton,, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Lady Anne Boleyn, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 8 hijas con Captain Thomas Woodhouse. Murió el 11 de septiembre de 1583, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 86 años.
